rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.note: Source domain (mizmar instrument); not LLM prior art.
PhaseGPT implements Kuramoto phase-coupled oscillator attention in transformers; same coupled-oscillator attention family as MIZMAR-BEAT's detuned head pair.
DIRECT FUNCTIONAL TWIN — Differential Transformer doubles Q/K, computes two attention maps, and subtracts them. This is precisely the difference-projection primitive at the core of MIZMAR-BEAT.
RoPE positional embedding analysis covering multi-frequency RoPE across heads — adjacent to paired-offset RoPE bases.
Positional attention heads via RoPE (ICLR 2025) — direct prior art on RoPE-frequency-indexed attention heads.
Frequency-stratified transformer cross-frequency attention — multi-frequency head primitive overlapping with MIZMAR-BEAT's detuned-frequency pair.
Descriptive QK/OV coupling analysis; below threshold.
Extended-context RoPE variant; different artefact; below threshold.

fail_reason: Five prior-art hits above threshold. The mechanism is over-determined by existing work: (a) Differential Transformer is a direct functional twin of the difference-projection primitive (doubles Q/K and subtracts attention maps, func=0.95, sem=0.92); (b) PhaseGPT already implements coupled-oscillator attention in transformers via Kuramoto coupling (func=0.85, sem=0.85); (c) ICLR 2025 RoPE positional-head papers (ranks 4-5) cover RoPE-frequency-indexed attention heads, the other half of MIZMAR-BEAT; (d) frequency-stratified cross-frequency attention (rank 6) covers multi-frequency head primitive. The combination of detuned-RoPE-pair + difference projection is a thin composition of (Differential Transformer) + (RoPE positional heads with offset frequencies), both of which are established prior art. Rule total_hits>=1 -> FAIL is satisfied 5x over.
cross_agent_agreement: Independent re-scoring confirms 07_hit_miss.json: 5 hits, same pattern (ranks 2-6 hit, ranks 1,7,8 miss). No disagreement with original judge.
